title: Spells & Adventure
description: A fairly heavyweight modpack that combines many magic mods, with some exploration and immersion mods too!
body:
What started as a fun little private modpack has, once again, escalated to a full open-world sandbox RPG.

Spells & Adventure is built around several RPG mods. It is inspired by games like Final Fantasy XIV and Path of Exile, but with that familiar "Modded Minecraft" feeling. It's a sandbox RPG in the sense that you can do anything, but there is still a clear line of progression in terms of strength and difficulty. 

Do you enjoy building a cute little farmstead and leading a simple life?
Go ahead!

Do you enjoy building complicated machines, combining the arcane with technology?
Be my guest!

Do you enjoy delving into dangerous dungeons in seek of glory and loot?
You are more than welcome!

Do you want to build magnificent structures and rule the land with your overwhelming magical prowess?
We've got you covered!

This pack is built with both singleplayer and multiplayer in mind, with systems in place to support things like parties, chunk claims, waystones, map sharing, and many more!

I will likely update this with more mods and other changes in the future, but as of writing I am very busy in my personal life, so don't expect constant updates and support.
